Interface NodeBehaviorStrategy

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultNodeBehavior, HiddenChainAttackBehavior, HonestNodeBehavior, HonestNodeBehaviorLimited, MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
public interface NodeBehaviorStrategy
Defines the strategy interface for Bitcoin node behavior within the Simulation environment.

Implementations of this interface encapsulate the decision-making logic for how a BitcoinNode responds to simulation events such as receiving client transactions, propagated transactions or blocks, and completing validation of mined blocks.

Concrete strategies may implement “honest” behavior, selfish mining, or experimental protocols by providing custom logic for each event type.

See Also:
  • BitcoinNode
  • DefaultNodeBehavior
  • HonestNodeBehavior

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    event_NodeCompletesValidation(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.ITxContainer t, long time)
    Invoked when the node completes validation of a transaction container, such as a newly mined or propagated block.
    void
    event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction t, long time)
    Invoked when the node receives a transaction directly from a client.
    void
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.ITxContainer t)
    Invoked when the node receives a propagated container of transactions, such as a block or batch of transactions.
    void
    event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction t, long time)
    Invoked when the node receives a transaction propagated from another node.

  • Method Details

    • event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction

      void event_NodeReceivesClientTransaction(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction t, long time)
      Invoked when the node receives a transaction directly from a client.
      Parameters:
      t - the transaction received from the client
      time - the current simulation time

    • event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction

      void event_NodeReceivesPropagatedTransaction(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.Transaction t, long time)
      Invoked when the node receives a transaction propagated from another node.
      Parameters:
      t - the propagated transaction
      time - the current simulation time

    • event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer

      void event_NodeReceivesPropagatedContainer(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.ITxContainer t)
      Invoked when the node receives a propagated container of transactions, such as a block or batch of transactions.
      Parameters:
      t - the propagated transaction container

    • event_NodeCompletesValidation

      void event_NodeCompletesValidation(dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.transaction.ITxContainer t, long time)
      Invoked when the node completes validation of a transaction container, such as a newly mined or propagated block.
      Parameters:
      t - the validated transaction container
      time - the current simulation time
